task: NCAL-1 — CalDAV read client + session-gated GET /api/calendar/events

snippets.description: basicAuthHeader() — Basic Auth built server-side from NEXTCLOUD_USER:NEXTCLOUD_APP_PASSWORD; never exported to client code.
buildReportBody() — CalDAV time-range formatted via toCalDavUtc() from Date args only (XML-injection guard).
fetchCalendarReport() error paths — network failure and any non-2xx (incl. 401) throw CalDavError('Calendar service unavailable') with no upstream status/credential in the message.
ATTACH/SOUND removeAllProperties() before any field is read (attachment payload never reaches JSON).
RRULE-expansion DoS clamp — MAX_WINDOW_MS (~2y) and MAX_OCCURRENCES (1000) reject abusively wide windows / unbounded recurrence.
Session gate (401 before try), date validation (400 outside the CalDavError catch), CalDavError → generic 503 remap.
